name: studio.publish
description: Publish a specific Actium Studio page by id. Thin hero wrapper over publish_page with a high-signal name.
whenToUse: User asks to ship a specific page that is currently in draft.
Follow-up step after a human review approves a studio.update_content draft edit.
HITL-approved publish in an autonomous CloudSwarm flow where the composite studio.update_content was too broad.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to publish every draft on a site — this skill is per-page; use a higher-level batch skill or a sequence of calls.
Page does not exist yet — create it via create_page (thin wrapper) before calling this skill; publish fails on unknown page_id.
Caller is in autonomous mode without operator approval and the page has not been reviewed — route through a HITL gate before invoking.
